name: node-server
description: Modular Node.js API server with component-based architecture

scripts.check-structure: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const dirs=['src','src/config','src/components','src/components/the_happy_hive','migrations']; dirs.forEach(d => console.log(d + ':', fs.existsSync(d) ? '✓' : '✗'))"
scripts.list-files: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const path=require('path'); function list(dir, indent='') { if(!fs.existsSync(dir)) return; fs.readdirSync(dir).slice(0,10).forEach(f => { if(!['.git','node_modules','.vscode'].includes(f)) { console.log(indent + f); if(fs.lstatSync(path.join(dir,f)).isDirectory()) list(path.join(dir,f), indent+'  '); } }); } list('.')"
scripts.verify-modules: node -e "['express','cors','dotenv','mysql2'].forEach(m => console.log(m + ':', require.resolve(m) ? '✓' : '✗'))" 2>&1 | grep -v node_modules || true
